title: cymbidium montanum
intro: Cymbidium montanum, also known as the mountain cymbidium, is a type of orchid native to the mountainous regions of China. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Cymbidium montanum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches and respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, Cymbidium montanum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
